arts.ttl: Leicester v Bournemouth: FPL team news + predicted line-ups
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs The post Leicester v Bournemouth: FPL team news + predicted line-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth boss sends William Saliba warning to his centre-backs ahead of Leicester City clash
arts.sum: I hope our centre-backs are ready because we know it’s not going to be comfortable for them.” Although City are yet to win, Iraola was quick to point out that, across their six fixtures, they’ve not yet been handsomely beaten and been well in contention going into the latter stages of every game.

arts.ttl: Foxes Q&A live on winless run, team selection, Cooper future, relegation battle
arts.sum: It’s six games without a victory for Leicester City, and while they remain outside of the relegation zone for now, the need for three points is growing. With the next four fixtures all offering excellent opportunities to claim three points, it will be interesting to see the team that Cooper opts for against the Cherries.

arts.ttl: Team News: Leicester City vs. Bournemouth injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Leicester City and Bournemouth.

arts.ttl: Premier League: Predictions for all seven games on Saturday
arts.sum: The Premier League reaches matchday seven this weekend and James Mason has highlighted our writers' best bets for all seven games taking place in the top flight on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Steve Cooper pressure growing as pundits weigh in on Leicester City's 'must-win' Bournemouth clash
arts.sum: Whilst he maintains the opinion that City will finish higher than fellow newly-promoted teams Ipswich Town, currently two places above Cooper's men in 15th, and Southampton, currently 19th, he foresees a 1-1 draw with Bournemouth this weekend, so no win before the break. Leicester City have one final opportunity before the next international break to register their first Premier League win under Steve Cooper, with Bournemouth their next visitors.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca makes Leicester City point after celebrating Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall's Chelsea goal
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca emphasised his belief in former Leicester City favourite Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall after jumping for joy over the midfielder’s first Chelsea goal. The Italian coach said Dewsbury-Hall has had to adjust from being the star man at City to just a member of the squad at Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Steve Cooper makes prediction over Leicester City's 'rocky road' as Nottingham Forest give clues
arts.sum: Leicester City’s path to success will be a “rocky road” but they will be better placed for coming through what Steve Cooper hopes will be their only difficult patch of the season. At the City Ground, Cooper endured a winless run of nine matches, with five victories from 10 then following.

arts.ttl: Leicester City suffer injury blow ahead of Bournemouth with Steve Cooper coy on absent players
arts.sum: But there could be more players absent from the weekend’s clash with Bournemouth, Cooper revealing that a couple of players haven’t trained this week. There’s been a couple of kicks for some players that we’ve had to manage through the week and that have not trained yet, but hopefully they’re getting over that and we’ll see if they’re available for the weekend.”

arts.ttl: Preview: Leicester City vs. Bournemouth - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Premier League clash between Leicester City and Bournemouth, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
